author: lOrm
content:
Resolved. Changes:

**New helper: `oauth::redact_oauth_error_body(body: &str) -> String`**
Extracts ONLY the OAuth-spec-safe fields (`error`, `error_description`) from a JSON body. If either field's value contains `refresh_token`, `access_token`, `client_secret`, `id_token`, `bearer `, `code=`, `state=`, or any contiguous alphanumeric run ‚Č• 24 chars (catches base64/hex token values Anthropic might inline), the description is replaced with `<redacted>`. Non-JSON bodies return the hard-coded string `<redacted: body contains sensitive fields>`.

**Call-site updates (mandated point 1):**
- `src/oauth.rs:581` (`send_token_request`): raw body ‚Üí `tracing::debug!` only; error string becomes `Token exchange failed ({status}): {redacted}`.
- `src/oauth.rs:639` (`create_api_key`): same pattern.
- `src/claude_credentials.rs:229` (`refresh_and_load`): same pattern via `crate::oauth::redact_oauth_error_body`.

Operator-side diagnostics retained: every site emits `tracing::debug!` with the raw body so engineers running with `RUST_LOG=debug` can still see what the upstream returned. The key property is: **`tracing::debug!` never reaches the axum Response body** ‚ÄĒ the proxy only sees the sanitized `anyhow::Error` string.

**Tests (mandated point 2):** 6 unit tests in `oauth::tests`:
- `redact_drops_refresh_token_in_description` ‚ÄĒ injects a mock 400 with `refresh_token ey.AbCdEf1234567890XYZ is expired`, asserts the substring `AbCdEf1234567890XYZ` is absent from the sanitized output.
- `redact_drops_access_token_mention` ‚ÄĒ `sk-ant-oat01-...` pattern, asserts absent.
- `redact_drops_long_base64_run` ‚ÄĒ 40-char base64 run in description, asserts absent.
- `redact_preserves_safe_description` ‚ÄĒ safe OAuth description passes through verbatim.
- `redact_non_json_body_is_hard_coded` ‚ÄĒ non-JSON body becomes the constant `<redacted: body contains sensitive fields>`.
- `redact_empty_body_handled` ‚ÄĒ empty and whitespace-only ‚Üí `<empty body>`.

All 620 lib + 130 integration tests pass.

**Mandated point 3 (follow-up audit):** grep for `response.text().await.unwrap_or_default()` across the rest of the auth paths surfaced no other hits on OAuth-sensitive endpoints. Non-OAuth error bodies (provider API errors from Anthropic `/v1/messages`) are out of scope for this issue ‚ÄĒ tracked by #352 (unbounded body read) and #281 (provider error shaping) independently.
